title: append VEX function
summary: Adds an item to an array or string.

title: cross VEX function
summary: Returns the cross product between the two vectors.

title: findlowerboundsorted VEX function
summary: Finds the largest item smaller than a target value in a sorted array.

title:
fit

                    
    
        VEX function
summary: Takes the value in one range and shifts it to the corresponding value in a new range.

title: foreach
summary: Loops over the items in an array, with optional enumeration.

title: hasprimattrib VEX function
summary: Returns if a geometry prim attribute exists.

title:
noise

                    
    
        VEX function
summary:
There are two forms of Perlin-style noise: a non-periodic noise which
changes randomly throughout N-dimensional space, and a periodic form
which repeats over a given range of space.

title: reverse VEX function
summary: Returns an array or string in reverse order.
